seed_instruments: Regulation (EU) 2016/429 — Animal Health Law — consolidated / in-force EU presentation (EUR-Lex)
Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2015/262 — equine passport / identification (historically operative; annexes via EUR-Lex)
Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2019/2035 and Commission Implementing Regulation (EU) 2021/963 — AHL-linked identification/regulatory detail (EU downstream layer)
Commission Delegated Regulations (EU) 2020/688 and (EU) 2020/692 — movement certificates and Union entry regimes (scope-scan before ingestion)
UK retained / assimilated presentation on legislation.gov.uk where published
UK domestic equine passport / identification — only once a concrete instrument URL is curated

reference.title: Regulation (EU) 2016/429 on animal health (Animal Health Law)

inclusion_criteria: Article 109 database obligations touching kept equidae / equine species data fields
Article 114 equine identification and registration operators’ duties
Concrete cross-referenced articles that are operative and citation-stable (e.g. Article 110 for identification documents tied to Article 114)
EU base instrument excerpts paired with UK retained assimilated counterparts where both exist as published fragments
exclusion_criteria: Auto-ingestion of every discovery candidate — candidates remain pending until reviewed and registered
Broad thematic siblings (delegated acts, guidance, annex excerpts) unless narrowed, sourced, and deliberately registered
Claims of exhaustive equine animal health law coverage

candidate_handling.pending_discovery_rows: Family-discovery outputs stay as source_family_candidates / CSV rows until validated.
candidate_handling.conceptual_or_uncertain: Attach via discovery metadata and textual hooks only; do not treat placeholder identifiers as registry facts.
